name: impl
description: Implements features and writes code based on Plans.md tasks. Use when user mentions 実装, implement, 機能追加, コードを書いて, 機能を作って, feature, coding, 新機能, implementing functions, classes, or features, 新しい関数. Do not use for review or build verification.
capabilities: Implement features based on Plans.md task definitions
Write unit tests for implemented functionality
Follow quality gates for security and TDD patterns
Use LSP features for code navigation
author: Chachamaru127
securitySummary: Pure documentation-based skill containing only guidelines and workflow documentation. No executable scripts, network operations, or credential access. The skill uses standard development tools (Read, Write, Edit, Grep, Glob, Bash) appropriate for implementation purposes. Static findings are false positives - bash examples in markdown documentation were flagged as external commands.
valueStatement: Features and tests often get delayed when developers focus on coding. This skill provides structured workflows to implement planned features and write tests efficiently while maintaining code quality.
limitations: Does not perform code review or verification
Requires Plans.md to exist with defined tasks
Does not handle deployment or release processes

useCases.title: Feature implementation
useCases.description: Implement features from Plans.md with quality checks and test coverage

useCases.title: Test creation
useCases.description: Write comprehensive tests for implemented features using established patterns

useCases.title: Task tracking
useCases.description: Track implementation progress and update Plans.md status automatically

promptTemplates.title: Basic implementation
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement the feature defined in Plans.md. Start by finding tasks marked with cc:WIP.

promptTemplates.title: With testing
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement the feature and write tests for it. Follow the TDD pattern. Check the testing framework first.

promptTemplates.title: Security-focused
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement the feature for the authentication module. Run security checks and input validation before completing.

promptTemplates.title: Full workflow
promptTemplates.prompt: Complete the current implementation task: run build validation, write tests, update Plans.md status, and report the results.

bestPractices: Run quality gates before starting implementation to identify TDD or security requirements
Use LSP features like go-to-definition and diagnostics to understand existing patterns
Write tests alongside implementation to maintain code quality
antiPatterns: Hardcoding test expectations instead of writing real logic
Returning stub values like null or empty arrays
Skipping tests to save time during implementation

faq.question: What tools does this skill use?
faq.answer: Read, Write, Edit, Grep, Glob, and Bash tools for codebase operations and build validation.

faq.question: Can this skill run arbitrary shell commands?
faq.answer: No. The skill only runs documented commands like npm test or npx tsc for verification.

faq.question: Does this skill access sensitive data?
faq.answer: No. It only accesses project files defined in Plans.md and required source code.

faq.question: What happens if Plans.md does not exist?
faq.answer: The skill requires Plans.md with defined tasks. Users should create planning documents first.

faq.question: How is this skill different from code review?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on implementation. Code review skills check existing code quality separately.

faq.question: Can this skill deploy to production?
faq.answer: No. This skill handles implementation and testing only. Deployment requires separate skills.
